name: Pavan KM
tagline: VAPT Specialist · Web Application Security · Ethical Hacker

hero.headline: Securing Systems. Exposing Weaknesses. Protecting What Matters.
hero.subheadline: Computer Science graduate with a strong interest in cybersecurity and offensive security. I am passionate about exploring how digital systems break so I can help teams build them back stronger.

about.bio: Computer Science graduate with a strong interest in cybersecurity and offensive security. I am passionate about exploring how digital systems break so I can help teams build them back stronger.

services.title: Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing
services.description: End-to-end VAPT engagements covering reconnaissance, exploitation, and post-exploitation analysis. I systematically probe web applications and network infrastructure using OWASP methodologies and industry-standard tooling to surface exploitable vulnerabilities before threat actors do.

services.title: Web Application Security
services.description: In-depth security reviews of web applications targeting the OWASP Top 10 and beyond — including authentication flaws, injection vulnerabilities, broken access controls, and insecure API surfaces. Each assessment is paired with developer-ready remediation guidance.

services.title: Security Reporting & Risk Analysis
services.description: Clear, executive-ready security reports that translate technical findings into measurable business risk. Each report includes CVSS-scored vulnerability details, evidence-backed proof-of-concept, severity ratings, and prioritized remediation roadmaps.
